def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # Part 1: (-1 * ts_min(low, 5)) + delay(ts_min(low, 5), 5)
    ts_min_low = ts_min(pl.col('low'), window=5)
    delayed_ts_min_low = delay(ts_min_low, periods=5)
    part1 = -1 * ts_min_low + delayed_ts_min_low

    # Part 2: rank(((sum(returns, 240) - sum(returns, 20)) / 220))
    sum_returns_240 = ts_sum(pl.col('returns'), window=240)
    sum_returns_20 = ts_sum(pl.col('returns'), window=20)
    part2_inner = (sum_returns_240 - sum_returns_20) / 220
    part2 = rank(part2_inner).over('date')

    # Part 3: ts_rank(volume, 5)
    part3 = ts_rank(pl.col('volume'), window=5)

    # Final factor
    factor = part1 * part2 * part3

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
